subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! This is the time for unity and accord, and the hour for oneness and alliance with the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی وقت اتحاد و اتفاق است و هنگام یگانگی و ائتلاف جمال قدم و اسم
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @unity; oneness of humanity
